message:
fix: Increase asyncify buffer to 1MB and protect from heap allocator

CPython has deep call stacks (_start → Py_Main → ceval → C extension
→ WASM import), and the 16KB asyncify buffer was likely overflowing.
The buffer was also placed at the END of grown memory where CPython's
heap allocator (sbrk) could overwrite it.

Changes:
- Increase ASYNCIFY_DATA_SIZE from 16KB to 1MB
- Place buffer at START of grown region (origSize) instead of end,
  so CPython's sbrk must exhaust all original memory before reaching it
